name: Cog
description: A wall of meshing gears — dotted teeth ring every wheel, and each redraw clicks the whole works one notch onward.

code.style: --hub: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* a dotted ring reads as gear teeth; rotating it turns the gear */ --teeth: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(12%, 22%); border: calc(38px / @Y) dotted @var(--teeth); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 16%; left: 42%; top: 42%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--hub); box-shadow: 0 0 0 calc(16px / @Y) @var(--teeth); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
